use_cases: Display brand identity on website headers and footers
Serve as a favicon or app icon for deer-themed brands
Feature as a hero section branding element for outdoor companies
Use in print materials like business cards and letterheads
Render as a loading state or empty state placeholder for nature apps
ai_summary: A custom SVG deer logo component featuring geometric, minimalist design with precise path definitions for scalable vector graphics. The component renders a stylized abstract deer shape with clean lines, suitable for branding and identity applications across various platforms.
